pack.icp: Agency owners running 20-100 monthly invoices for retainer clients.
pack.wtp: Two agency owners say they would pay for reminders that preserve client tone.
pack.competitor_gap: Competitors are bad and this is better.
pack.outreach: I saw agency owners discuss awkward invoice follow-ups. I am testing tone-aware reminders; would feedback be useful? Reply stop if not relevant.
pack.landing: Tone-aware invoice reminders for retainer agencies.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 agency owners. Day 2: compare invoice tools. Day 3: test $29/mo. Day 4-6: collect replies. Day 7: decide.
